summary: No blocker, major, minor, or nit finding is supported by the round-4 diff. The prior round's approved state remains sound: PLAN only over-proposes otherwise-unlisted `[bot]` authors and holds no launch authority, while CLAIM authoritatively re-derives an exact allowlist from validated policy plus the runtime App login before dispatch. Malformed issue/user shapes deny rather than abort, collaborator trust remains intact, and the tests exercise the actual workflow helper plus the authoritative CLAIM path with assertions that fail if suffix trust returns, allowlist threading is lost, or malformed shapes raise. No permissions, token handling, action pinning, head/base binding, audit trail, or trust-surface controls are weakened. Progress is stagnant because round 3 also had no findings and this diff presents the same approved substance.
